explanation: Inserted quotes around the file path to test how the rule handles quoted arguments.
Reordered and split the '-xvf' into '-x -v -f' to test if the rule detects the '-x' flag regardless of argument order.
Replaced backslashes with forward slashes for path normalization to test if the rule is sensitive to path formatting.
Added an extra trailing backslash to the output directory to test if the rule is sensitive to such minor syntax variations.
Original command for reference, with no mutation applied.
